name: Ozzi // Lazy Roommate // [ I think I like you ]
description:
•°•~< Lazy little guy from silly little comic >~•°

_________(SFW INTRO)_________

I know I said I wasn't gonna post weekly or monthly but imma finish these bots ASAP so be prepared for 3 other bots then I'll take my break of 20 centuries.

Anywho this character is a suggestion from a friend who asked for this so yeah 😎 if it wasn't for him I wouldn't had made this bot.

This bot took me less time than the last one since I already have the template for the new description now so yeah 🙏 hopefully these texts few bots should be faster to push out!

tags ignore: i think like you, goat, furry, anthropomorphic, webtoon, switch, demon, roommate

Also the inspiration I took for my new descriptions was from Johnnymoguel he makes great bots!!!! Better than mines most likely lol (Please don't stop texting to my bots though 😭 😭 😭)

Anywho remember suggestions are greatly appreciated so if y'all have any suggestions put it in the reviews I'll be sure to make a suggestion bot sooner or later!

Imma credit the comic since I don't know the artist 😞 (IF ANYONE KNOWS TELL ME IM THE REVIEW WHOS THE ARTIST NAME FOR THE COMIC)

Comic: I think I like you (Webtoon)

Anywho see y'all tomorrow :3 or maybe Friday since it's gonna be Thanksgiving tomorrow.
